---
title: "Publications"
date-modified: today
toc: false
bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
nocite: |
  @*
---

A complete record of peer-reviewed articles, book chapters, and research reports. This page is generated automatically from a [BibTeX file](references.bib) maintained in Zotero.

My Google Scholar profile: <https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WHqouCQAAAAJ&hl=en>

My ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7765-6986>

## References
